'''鈭歫-b-r''' ('''kajabar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yang|yang]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yang|yang]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-b-r
|-
! Lemma
| kajabar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijabar|thijabar]] || [[word:jijabar|jijabar]] || [[word:shijabar|shijabar]] || [[word:kijabar|kijabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujabar|thuthujabar]] || [[word:jujujabar|jujujabar]] || [[word:shushujabar|shushujabar]] || [[word:kukujabar|kukujabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujabar|thujabar]] || [[word:jujabar|jujabar]] || [[word:shujabar|shujabar]] || [[word:kujabar|kujabar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujabar|thujabar]] || [[word:jujabar|jujabar]] || [[word:shujabar|shujabar]] || [[word:kujabar|kujabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejabar|thejabar]] || [[word:jejabar|jejabar]] || [[word:shejabar|shejabar]] || [[word:kejabar|kejabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojabar|thothojabar]] || [[word:jojojabar|jojojabar]] || [[word:shoshojabar|shoshojabar]] || [[word:kokojabar|kokojabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojabar|thojabar]] || [[word:jojabar|jojabar]] || [[word:shojabar|shojabar]] || [[word:kojabar|kojabar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojabar|thojabar]] || [[word:jojabar|jojabar]] || [[word:shojabar|shojabar]] || [[word:kojabar|kojabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jabar|th忙jabar]] || [[word:j忙jabar|j忙jabar]] || [[word:sh忙jabar|sh忙jabar]] || [[word:k忙jabar|k忙jabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajabar|thathajabar]] || [[word:jajajabar|jajajabar]] || [[word:shashajabar|shashajabar]] || [[word:kakajabar|kakajabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajabar|thajabar]] || [[word:jajabar|jajabar]] || [[word:shajabar|shajabar]] || [[word:kajabar|kajabar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajabar|thajabar]] || [[word:jajabar|jajabar]] || [[word:shajabar|shajabar]] || [[word:kajabar|kajabar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajabar|shajabar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajabar|goshajabar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajabar|gokishajabar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajabarn眉|shajabarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajabarnkn眉|goshajabarnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabarn眉|gokishajabarn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajabarsh毛|shajabarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajabarnksh毛|goshajabarnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajabarsh毛|gokishajabarsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabaro|shajabaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabarnkro|goshajabarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabaro|gokishajabaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabarmu|shajabarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabarnkmu|goshajabarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabarmu|gokishajabarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajabarsher|shajabarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajabarnksher|goshajabarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajabarsher|gokishajabarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajabarng|shajabarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajabarnkng|goshajabarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajabarng|gokishajabarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajabarya|shajabarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajabarnkya|goshajabarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajabarya|gokishajabarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajabaryam|shajabaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajabarnkyam|goshajabarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajabaryam|gokishajabaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabarn眉sh毛|shajabarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabarnkn眉sh毛|goshajabarnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabarn眉sh毛|gokishajabarn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabarn眉ro|shajabarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabarnkn眉ro|goshajabarnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabarn眉ro|gokishajabarn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabarn眉mu|shajabarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabarnkn眉mu|goshajabarnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabarn眉mu|gokishajabarn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabarsh毛n眉|shajabarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabarnksh毛n眉|goshajabarnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabarsh毛n眉|gokishajabarsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabarsh毛ro|shajabarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabarnksh毛ro|goshajabarnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabarsh毛ro|gokishajabarsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabarsh毛mu|shajabarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabarnksh毛mu|goshajabarnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabarsh毛mu|gokishajabarsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabaron眉|shajabaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabarnkron眉|goshajabarnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabaron眉|gokishajabaron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabarosh毛|shajabarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabarnkrosh毛|goshajabarnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabarosh毛|gokishajabarosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabaromu|shajabaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabarnkromu|goshajabarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabaromu|gokishajabaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabarmun眉|shajabarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabarnkmun眉|goshajabarnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabarmun眉|gokishajabarmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabarmush毛|shajabarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabarnkmush毛|goshajabarnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabarmush毛|gokishajabarmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabarmuro|shajabarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabarnkmuro|goshajabarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabarmuro|gokishajabarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
